version_description: This is a Male Female duet.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Making Love Out Of Nothing At All

content:
[Autoscroll 3]


[Verse Male]

[tab]  [ch]G[/ch]                                             [ch]C[/ch]
I realize the best part of love is the thinnest slice and it don't count for much,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                                               [ch]G[/ch]
but I'm not letting go, I believe there's still much to believe in.[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]C[/ch]
So lift your eyes if you feel you can, reach for a star and I'll show you a plan[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                                           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]B[/ch]
I figured it out, what I needed was someone to show me.[/tab]

[Verse Female]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]
You know you can't fool me, I've been loving you too long.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]A/C#[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
It started so easy, you want to carry ooooooon (carry oooooooon)[/tab]

[Chorus Both]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                         [ch]C[/ch]
Lost in love and I don't know much, was I thinking aloud, and fell out of touch,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]
But I'm back on my feet, and eager to be what you wanted.[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]C[/ch]
So lift your eyes if you feel you can, reach for a star and I'll show you a plan[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                                           [ch]G[/ch]
I figured it out, what I needed was someone to show me.[/tab]

[Verse Female]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
You know you can't fool me, I've been loving you too long.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]A/C#[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
It started so easy, you want to carry ooooooon (carry oooooooon)[/tab]

[Chorus Both]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                          [ch]C[/ch]
Lost in love and I don't know much, was I thinking aloud, and fell out of touch,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                                         [ch]G[/ch]
But I'm back on my feet, and eager to be what you wanted.[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]

[Verse Female]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
You know you can't fool me, I've been loving you too long.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]A/C#[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
It started so easy, you want to carry ooooooon (carry oooooooon)[/tab]

[Chorus Female]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                          [ch]C[/ch]
Lost in love and I don't know much, was I thinking aloud, and fell out of touch,[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                                         [ch]G[/ch]
But I'm back on my feet, and eager to be what you wanted.[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
(Now I'm lost,)                       (lost in love)[/tab]
         Lost In Love and I don't know much      Was I thinking aloud
               (lost in love)                               (lost in loooooooove)
and fell out of touch,   But I'm back on my feet and eager to be what you wanted.

(Now I'm lost,)                      (lost in love)
        Lost In Love and I don't know much      Was I thinking aloud
               (lost in love)                               (lost in loooooooove)
and fell out of touch,   But I'm back on my feet and eager to be what you wanted.

(Now I'm lost,)                       (lost in love)
         Lost In Love and I don't know much      Was I thinking aloud
               (lost in love)                               (lost in loooooooove)
and fell out of touch,   But I'm back on my feet and eager to be what you wanted.

(Now I'm lost,)                      (lost in love)
        Lost In Love and I don't know much      Was I thinking aloud
               (lost in love)                               (lost in loooooooove)
and fell out of touch,   But I'm back on my feet and eager to be what you wanted.
